pro-tuner.description: Find and fix accessibility issues in the tuner UI — missing aria labels, keyboard navigation, color contrast.
pro-tuner.hints: Start with: grep -rn 'aria-' src/ | head -20. Check <button> and <input> elements without aria-label. Look in src/components/ for the main tuner component.

pro-tuner.description: Write unit tests for the audio processing / pitch detection logic.
pro-tuner.hints: Find the pitch detection module: find src/ -name '*pitch*' -o -name '*audio*' -o -name '*tuner*'. Create a test file next to it. Test: silence input, known frequency (440Hz = A4), out-of-range values.

pro-tuner.description: Add input validation to ensure the reference frequency (A4) is within a reasonable range (400-480 Hz) and show a warning.
pro-tuner.hints: grep -rn '440\|A4\|reference' src/ --include='*.js' --include='*.jsx' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | head -10. Find where the user can change the reference frequency and add bounds checking.

pro-tuner.description: Extract duplicated logic in the main tuner component into helper functions without changing behavior.
pro-tuner.hints: Find the largest component: wc -l src/components/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx} 2>/dev/null | sort -n | tail -5. Look for repeated code blocks (copy-paste patterns).

games-project.description: Fix Django views that are missing try/except or CSRF protection.
games-project.hints: grep -rn 'def.*request' */views.py | head -15. Then check each view: does it have @csrf_protect or CsrfViewMiddleware? Does it handle DoesNotExist?

games-project.description: Write Django unit tests for the main game models — creation, validation, custom methods.
games-project.hints: Find models: grep -rn 'class.*Model' */models.py | head -10. Create tests in the same app directory as tests.py. Use django.test.TestCase.

games-project.description: Add Django model field validators (MinValueValidator, MaxValueValidator) where numeric fields lack bounds.
games-project.hints: grep -rn 'IntegerField\|FloatField\|DecimalField' */models.py | head -15. Check which ones lack validators=[]. Import from django.core.validators.

homemusic.description: Fix Django settings security issues — DEBUG=True in production, missing ALLOWED_HOSTS, exposed SECRET_KEY.
homemusic.hints: cat */settings.py | head -60. Check: DEBUG should read from env, SECRET_KEY should read from env, ALLOWED_HOSTS should not be ['*'].

homemusic.description: Write tests for the API endpoints — valid requests, 404s, 400s, invalid data.
homemusic.hints: grep -rn 'path\|url' */urls.py | head -15. Pick 2-3 endpoints. Use django.test.Client to GET/POST them.

chord-library.description: Fix unhandled promise rejections or missing error handling in async functions.
chord-library.hints: grep -rn 'async\s' src/ --include='*.js' | head -15. Then check each: does the await have a try/catch? Are .then() chains missing .catch()?

chord-library.description: Write unit tests for the chord transposition logic — all 12 keys, sharp and flat notation.
chord-library.hints: grep -rn 'transpos\|semitone\|interval' src/ --include='*.js' | head -10. Find the function, create a test file, test C->D (2 semitones), edge cases at B->C wrap.

cookbook.description: Fix XSS vulnerabilities in Django templates — user content rendered without escaping.
cookbook.hints: grep -rn '|safe\|mark_safe\|{{.*}}' templates/ --include='*.html' | head -15. Any {{ user_input|safe }} is a potential XSS. Remove |safe or use bleach.

cookbook.description: Add pagination to list views that don't have it, using Django's Paginator with 20 items per page.
cookbook.hints: grep -rn 'def.*list\|ListView\|all()' */views.py | head -10. Check if Paginator is imported and used. Add it where .all() is returned directly.

vocabulary.description: Fix missing authentication checks — unauthenticated users can access protected API endpoints.
vocabulary.hints: grep -rn 'def.*request' */views.py | head -15. Check: is @login_required or IsAuthenticated used? Find views without auth decorators that modify data.

vocabulary.description: Fix N+1 query problems — add select_related or prefetch_related where needed.
vocabulary.hints: grep -rn '\.objects\.' */views.py | head -15. Any .all() or .filter() followed by accessing related objects in a loop is an N+1. Add select_related('field').

jarvis-agent.description: Fix error handling in the agent's tool execution pipeline — uncaught errors that crash the agent.
jarvis-agent.hints: grep -rn 'catch\|throw\|reject' src/ --include='*.js' | head -15. Also: grep -rn 'process.exit' src/ | head -5. Find try/catch blocks with empty catch bodies.

jarvis-agent.description: Write unit tests for the message parsing and routing logic.
jarvis-agent.hints: grep -rn 'parse\|route\|dispatch' src/ --include='*.js' | head -10. Find the parser function, write tests with valid messages, malformed JSON, empty strings.

nex-code.description: Fix HTTP error handling in cli/providers/ollama.js — status codes are lost in error wrapping.
nex-code.hints: Read cli/providers/ollama.js lines 200-300. Find where HTTP errors are caught and re-thrown. The status code from the response should be preserved in the error object.

nex-code.description: Write tests for the autoFixPath function in cli/tools/index.js — cover all 5 strategies.
nex-code.hints: Read cli/tools/index.js and search for 'autoFixPath'. It has 5 strategies: normalize, ext variants, basename, case-insensitive, smartSearch. Create tests/tools-autofix.test.js.

nex-code.description: Improve token estimation accuracy in cli/context-engine.js compression phases.
nex-code.hints: Read cli/context-engine.js and find estimateTokens(). Check if it uses a simple chars/4 heuristic. Compare with actual tiktoken counts. Fix any systematic over/under-estimation.

nex-code.description: Add better error messages for Ollama Cloud 429 rate limit errors — include retry-after header info.
nex-code.hints: grep -n '429\|rate.limit\|retry.after' cli/providers/ollama.js. Find where HTTP status is checked. Add: if (status === 429) { extract Retry-After header, format user-friendly message }.

biohonig.description: Fix XSS in Django templates — user-generated content rendered with |safe filter.
biohonig.hints: grep -rn '|safe\|mark_safe' templates/ --include='*.html' | head -10. Remove |safe from user-controlled content.

biohonig.description: Add meta tags (og:image, og:title, description) to main pages for SEO.
biohonig.hints: Find base template: find templates/ -name 'base*' -o -name 'layout*'. Add <meta> tags inside <head>. Use Django template variables for page-specific values.

schoensgibl.description: Fix mobile layout breaks at 320px viewport — overflowing elements, broken flex layouts.
schoensgibl.hints: Find CSS files: find . -name '*.css' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' | head -10. Search for fixed widths: grep -n 'width:.*px' *.css | head -15. Replace with max-width or percentages.

schoensgibl.description: Write Django tests for the contact form — valid submission, invalid email, missing required fields.
schoensgibl.hints: grep -rn 'contact\|ContactForm\|contact_view' */forms.py */views.py */urls.py | head -10. Use django.test.TestCase + self.client.post('/contact/', data).
